title: natsmap subscribers.yaml / publishers.yaml
description: Schema for clients/natsmap (https://github.com/theizzatbek/gokit/tree/main/clients/natsmap). Covers the union of top-level keys (`subscribers`, `publishers`, `streams`) so a single combined YAML or split subscribers.yaml / publishers.yaml both validate. Add `# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/theizzatbek/gokit/main/schemas/natsmap.schema.json` to the top of each file.

streams.description: App-managed JetStream stream definitions. natsmap idempotently EnsureStream on each entry at Build.

name.description: Subscriber identity. Must match the name passed to natsmap.RegisterHandler[T] / RegisterBatchedHandler[T].

subject.description: NATS subject to subscribe on. Supports wildcards (`*`, `>`). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution at Load.

durable.description: JetStream durable consumer name. When set, the subscription survives restarts; omitted = ephemeral.

queue_group.description: NATS queue group for load-balancing across N subscribers. Combined with ServerGroup suffix when service-side ServerGroup is set.

max_in_flight.description: Per-subscriber semaphore on concurrent handler goroutines.

max_deliver.description: JetStream redelivery cap before a message is moved to the per-stream DLQ.

ack_wait.description: Handler deadline as a Go duration; an in-flight message becomes eligible for redelivery once exceeded.

backoff.description: Per-message retry backoff. Drives JetStream's BackOff array on the consumer config.

start_from.description: JetStream DeliverPolicy hint. Supported values map to nats.DeliverPolicy (e.g. `all`, `new`, `last`).

filter_subject.description: Optional consumer-side subject filter when the bound stream covers a wider pattern.

batch_size.description: Opts into batched-handler mode. Requires natsmap.RegisterBatchedHandler[T] (mismatch surfaces as natsmap_batch_handler_required / natsmap_regular_handler_required at Build).

batch_interval.description: Max wait between Fetch() calls in batched mode (Go duration). Default 1s.

name.description: Publisher identity. Must match the name passed to natsmap.RegisterPublisher[T] / used in natsmap.Publish[T].

subject.description: Outbound subject. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution at Load.

headers.description: Static NATS headers applied to every message published through this publisher.

base.description: Base interval (Go duration). For fixed mode this is the only delay.
